title: England to get powerful maternity commissioner after ‘shocking’ failings
description: Health secretary announces move after Amos review finds childbirth and neonatal care in need of ‘urgent reform’
content:
A powerful maternity commissioner will be appointed to push through an urgent transformation of childbirth care in England after a major review concluded that it had multiple failings.

title: New defence secretary wins another £1.5bn to boost drone spending
description: Dan Jarvis persuaded Rachel Reeves to reduce £18bn funding gap that led to predecessor resigning
content:
The new defence secretary has secured an extra £1.5bn to the UK’s long-delayed defence investment plan, with the bulk of that to be spent on drones to deter Russia and Iran.
Rows about closing an £18bn funding gap had led to the resignation of John H... [4511 chars]

title: Chinese tycoon sentenced to 30 years in US jail
description: Guo Wengui branded himself as a China critic, gaining followers who backed his fraudulent schemes.
content:
Guo Wengui, who was once believed to be one of China's richest businessmen, has been sentenced to 30 years in jail in the US for running a billion dollar scam.
The former property tycoon fled China to the US in 2017, where he reinvented himself as a ... [997 chars]

title: Homes harder to sell as high mortgage rates frustrate buyers
description: Three in five homes listed for sale since January remain on the market, says property portal Zoopla.
content:
Three in five homes listed for sale since January remain on the market, according to property portal Zoopla, as high mortgage rates frustrate potential buyers.
A lack of demand from buyers, as well as some high asking prices from sellers, have left h... [1698 chars]

title: 'We can't continue like this': Inquiry demands NHS maternity overhaul
description: An independent inquiry into England's maternity services has found "unacceptable racism and discrimination" is affecting patient safety.
content:
A national inquiry has strongly criticised the NHS maternity system in England, saying it is "not set up to deliver consistently safe, high-quality and compassionate care".
